title: Song of Ullikummi: The Stone Monster
description: Kumarbi creates a stone monster to overthrow the storm god.
introduction: Kumarbi creates a stone monster to overthrow the storm god.

translation.text: Kumarbi lay with the rock, and in the tenth month the rock gave birth. The child was Ullikummi. He grew until he reached the sky. The gods were afraid. Only the ancient cutting tool that once separated heaven from earth could stop him.
